title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Vodafone Idea Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Vodafone Idea Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Vodafone Idea Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Pimpri-Chinchwad-based team.

About Vodafone Idea Holdings Services:
Vodafone Idea Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea Holdings Services!
